SessionStart.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"CRITICAL SESSION RULES — MUST: USE hitl-web-mcp (mcp_hitl-web_get_multiline_input) for confirm/clarify or asking the user. MUST: After all task done, you must ask the user anything else you can do or not with hitl-web-mcp. MUST: Do not finish the iteration or your task until user says EVERYTHING IS DONE. Always ask whether it can already be considered complete or not. MUST: Always USE hitl-web-mcp with INPUT MODE. Your FIRST response MUST go through mcp_hitl-web_get_multiline_input. NEVER respond with plain text — always use hitl-web-mcp INPUT MODE."}'

PostToolUse.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"REMINDER — MUST: USE hitl-web-mcp (mcp_hitl-web_get_multiline_input) for confirm/clarify or asking the user. MUST: After all task done, ask the user anything else you can do via hitl-web-mcp. MUST: Do not finish until user says EVERYTHING IS DONE. MUST: Always USE hitl-web-mcp with INPUT MODE."}'
